Description: Uses OPTICS algorithm for highly varying language density. Blends LLM vectors with text-length features via Early Fusion.
Forces every query into a bucket (0% noise) using a static pre-determined cluster count proportional to dataset size.
Production logic: Uses HDBSCAN to magically 'scout' the perfect K value, then uses Agglomerative to map it flawlessly.
Fuses dense semantic LLM vectors with sparse vocabulary TF-IDF matrices before running UMAP/HDBSCAN.

Experiment: Exp 4: God Mode (HDBSCAN + Length + Metadata Fusion)
